title: Citation C4 repaired with primary source
analysis_summary: Traced the cited reference back to the strongest claim in the candidate rationale and verified it is a review citing a review. Located a tighter 2024 primary source on the DOI registry, read the abstract and methods, and confirmed it supports the original sentence with a smaller confidence interval. Proposing the replacement.
findings: Replacement DOI: 10.1038/s41586-2024-citation-demo. Original ref kept as secondary so the trail is reproducible.
limitations: Did not retrieve the full-text PDF of the replacement; the abstract + methods section were sufficient for the swap.
